Projects

A showcase of some of my featured work

Cloud-Native E-Commerce Platform

A highly resilient microservices architecture handling large-scale traffic, built with Spring Boot, Kafka, and Kubernetes.

JavaSpring BootKafkaDocker+1

Outfit Accessories Recommender

An AI-powered outfit and accessories recommendation system that analyzes user preferences and trends.

ReactNode.jsExpressMongoDB+1
CodeLive Demo

Serverless Analytics Pipeline

Real-time log ingestion and analytics pipeline using AWS Lambda, Kinesis, and DynamoDB.

Node.jsAWS LambdaKinesisTerraform+1

Building digital experiences that matter, one line of code at a time. Crafting interfaces that feel alive, solving problems that make a difference, and turning ideas into reality. Every pixel has a purpose.
